description: Abyssal Depths Patch 1 (8 July 2025) — Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

subsections.heading: The Depths Changes

items.text: Gift of Wrath, Dominion, and Cruelty buff durations have been extended from 5 minutes to 10 minutes
Demonic Ferocity stacks now persist after death and resurrection

subsections.searchable_text: The Depths Changes Gift of Wrath, Dominion, and Cruelty buff durations have been extended from 5 minutes to 10 minutes Demonic Ferocity stacks now persist after death and resurrection

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Antiquarian Standing has been adjusted for all features accessible through the Antiquarian’s Den. We aim to keep all features competitive for earning standing, while also preserving the prestige and accomplishment of unlocking higher-level rewards

subitems.text: Standing gained through most Hellgate modes and the Depths has been reduced
Standing gained through Corrupted Dungeons and Lethal 2v2 Hellgates has been increased

items.text: Custom match cancellations are now shown as system messages instead of popups
Hellgates now have a 10 minute PvP knockdown timer
Elite mobs in World Boss areas now give 34% less Fame

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes Antiquarian Standing has been adjusted for all features accessible through the Antiquarian’s Den. We aim to keep all features competitive for earning standing, while also preserving the prestige and accomplishment of unlocking higher-level rewards Standing gained through most Hellgate modes and the Depths has been reduced Standing gained through Corrupted Dungeons and Lethal 2v2 Hellgates has been increased Custom match cancellations are now shown as system messages instead of popups Hellgates now have a 10 minute PvP knockdown timer Elite mobs in World Boss areas now give 34% less Fame

We aim to keep all features competitive for earning standing, while also preserving the prestige and accomplishment of unlocking higher-level rewards Custom match cancellations are now shown as system messages instead of popups Hellgates now have a 10 minute PvP knockdown timer Elite mobs in World Boss areas now give 34% less Fame

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: The Depths Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Soulgates would not be properly distributed
Fixed issue where Item Power in the entrance UI could be miscalculated when having trashed items equipped
Fixed some missing or duplicated tooltips

subsections.searchable_text: The Depths Fixes Fixed issue where Soulgates would not be properly distributed Fixed issue where Item Power in the entrance UI could be miscalculated when having trashed items equipped Fixed some missing or duplicated tooltips

subsections.heading: Quick Learn Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Quick Learn would be automatically enabled after maintenance without notifying the player
Fixed issue where right-clicking Quick Learn toggles would change the setting without updating its visual state in the Destiny Board

subsections.searchable_text: Quick Learn Fixes Fixed issue where Quick Learn would be automatically enabled after maintenance without notifying the player Fixed issue where right-clicking Quick Learn toggles would change the setting without updating its visual state in the Destiny Board

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Soulspindle Pounce (Soulspinner): Fixed issue where the immunity effect would not be applied
Fixed issue where certain spells incorrectly delayed auto-attacks

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Soulspindle Pounce (Soulspinner): Fixed issue where the immunity effect would not be applied Fixed issue where certain spells incorrectly delayed auto-attacks

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where relogging during the Destiny Board tutorial would cause display issues
Fixed issue where the Destiny Board progress filter in the HUD Tracker would not work
Fixed issue where the progress counter for the ‘Catch 5 fish’ Albion Journal mission would not update
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where some spell tooltips appeared larger than intended

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where relogging during the Destiny Board tutorial would cause display issues Fixed issue where the Destiny Board progress filter in the HUD Tracker would not work Fixed issue where the progress counter for the ‘Catch 5 fish’ Albion Journal mission would not update [MOBILE] Fixed issue where some spell tooltips appeared larger than intended

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Resource Wisps would spawn too often
Fixed issue where opening the Destiny Board via hotkey when it was hidden in the HUD would cause the game to crash
Fixed issue where incorrect Might requirements and rewards were set for the Conqueror’s Challenge
Fixed issue where the Tier 8 Truebolt Hammer could not be listed on the Marketplace
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
